micro_blocks.title: Executive Summary
items: State the overall OSINT assessment outcome for the vendor
Summarize the key observations across all intelligence categories
Call out the key risk indicators surfaced by collection

micro_blocks.title: Intelligence Summary
items: Compliance findings (certifications, trust center, security commitments)
Reputation findings (news, public incidents, reputation indicators)

micro_blocks.title: Significant Findings
items: Critical observations and why they matter
Recommended actions, each tied to its supporting evidence

micro_blocks.title: Dashboard Reference
items: Reviewers can navigate from the report into the dashboard for drill-down
